BeezShield Overview
BeezShield builds machine trust infrastructure for autonomous systems. Sentinel Alpha is the production product agent that provides execution fidelity decisions before a bot or agent acts on-chain.

Sentinel Alpha
Sentinel Alpha is a Base-native risk decision API for bots, DeFi agents, and autonomous wallets. It returns deterministic machine-readable outputs for pre-execution policy enforcement.

Live Website
https://beezshield.com

Live API
https://api.beezshield.com/contracts/risk-score

ERC-8004 Profile
https://8004scan.io/agents/base/45967

GitHub
https://github.com/chox-cell/Sentinel-Alpha

x402 Pricing Lanes (USDC)
- basic: 0.02
- executive: 0.05
- premium: 0.10
- priority: 0.15

Example cURL
curl -X POST "https://api.beezshield.com/contracts/risk-score" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "X-SENTINEL-LANE: basic" \
  -H "X402-PAYMENT: tx:0xYOUR_TRANSACTION_HASH" \
  -d '{"contract_address":"0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111","chain":"base","context":{}}'
